---
title: "get_series_list"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_series_list()`

Get Series List

## Usage

```r
get_series_list(
  category = NULL,
  max_pages = NULL,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `category` | Character. Filter by category. |
| `max_pages` | Integer. Maximum pages to fetch. NULL for all. |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A tibble with series information including ticker, title, category,
frequency, and settlement sources.

## Description

Retrieves all available series templates. A series represents a recurring
event format (e.g., "Daily High Temperature in NYC").

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
series <- get_series_list()
head(series)

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other series: 
`get_series()`
